content_body: Our family had a great week at your lovely cabin. The decor is amazing! Every day we would notice something new. There are just too many exceptional things to list. We especially loved quiet times on the porch as well as watching college football games there. Go Dawgs!! We also enjoyed waving to the folks on the train over the weekend. Our trip to downtown Blue Ridge was fun as well as our visit to Mercier Orchards. The people at the Orchard were very, very friendly and helpful. All in all, I would rate our vacation a 10. We loved it here!
title: Our Stay Was A 10/10!
